suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet moments before Fajr to pray and set my intentions for the day.
I'm thankful for a smooth production deployment without any unexpected rollbacks.
I'm grateful for a hot plate of nasi lemak and a perfect cup of teh tarik to start my morning.
I'm thankful for the teammate who patiently reviewed my pull request and helped me optimize my code.
I'm grateful for the rain that cooled down the afternoon heat while I worked from home.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job in tech that allows me to support myself and my family.
I'm grateful for the clean, peaceful office surau where I can take a midday break to pray and reset.
I'm thankful for finally finding and fixing that memory leak bug that was bugging me all week.
I'm grateful for the MRT running on time today, saving me from the peak hour traffic.
I'm thankful for a Friday afternoon that didn't bring any urgent, last-minute hotfixes.
I'm grateful for a warm dinner with my family after a long day of staring at a screen.
I'm thankful for the fast fiber internet speed that makes downloading dependencies and video calls seamless.
I'm grateful for the blessing of health, allowing me to keep up with my daily routines and prayers.
I'm thankful for the laughter shared with colleagues over a quick lunch at the nearby mamak.
I'm grateful for open-source libraries and clear documentation that saved me hours of writing code from scratch.
